# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: microservices-route
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: service1
        port:
          number: 80
    - destination:
        host: service2
        port:
          number: 80
    - destination:
        host: service3
        port:
          number: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: microservices-destination
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100

---
# Repeat the destination rule for each required service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service1-destination
spec:
  host: service1
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service2-destination
spec:
  host: service2
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service3-destination
spec:
  host: service3
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
